reviews.comment:
Pésima atención
La playera no cuenta con identificación
No pregunta nada
Y tuve q bajar del auto

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service.
The shirt didn't have any identification.
They didn't ask any questions.
And I had to get out of the car.

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Vanessa! Lamentamos que hayas tenido esta mala experiencia. Seguiremos trabajando para una mejor atención. Saludos. Equipo YPF

reviews.comment:
Me decepciono la atencion, una sola chica, todas las mesas sucias, pedi me limpien me dijeron buscate otra, no me dieron cuchara para el cafe, pedi una me dan una rota, la comida fria, la peor YPF que pise lejos

(Translated by Google)
I was disappointed with the service; there was only one girl, all the tables were dirty, I asked them to clean them and they told me to find another one, they didn't give me a spoon for my coffee, I asked for one and they gave me a broken one, the food was cold, the worst YPF I've ever been to by far

reviewReply.comment: Buen día Pablo! Lamentamos que hayas tenido esta mala experiencia. Seguiremos trabajando para una mejor atención. Saludos. Equipo YPF
